summary: The Skia preview package, injected primitive adapter, and local renderer contract coverage exist, but native install and renderer parity evidence are incomplete.

completedEntries.notes: Skia package remains optional and avoids static Skia imports.

Local primitive tests plus LineChart, BarChart, PieChart, ProgressChart, ContributionGraph, CombinedChart, and CandlestickChart renderer contract tests run through npm run skia:parity. The local tests cover Skia font-backed text measurement, measured text anchors, and the injected sticky Y-axis label path.

The optional-Skia native release helper plans and runs QA in a temporary workspace so @shopify/react-native-skia is not committed to the free showcase package. Native install, renderer parity, and performance rows still require successful platform runs and review evidence.

coveredSurfaces: PieChart and DonutChart SVG text labels
ContributionGraph and CalendarHeatmap SVG text labels
